item.title: Comparing characteristics and outcomes between hospitalized adults on a pea protein or dairy/soy protein formulas: initial findings.
item.description: Journal of comparative effectiveness research - Enteral formulas are an essential part of nutrition support to prevent or treat malnutrition and minimize hospital length of stay (LOS). Yet not all formulas are tolerated and may leave nutritional...

item.title: Home Parenteral Nutrition (HPN) in Adult Patients: Indications and outcome.
item.description: Clinical nutrition ESPEN - Home parenteral nutrition (HPN) is used in patients with chronic intestinal failure (IF) who cannot meet their nutritional requirements by oral and/or enteral intake and who can be safely managed o...

item.title: Anti-inflammatory dietary interventions in inflammatory bowel disease: current insights and future perspectives.
item.description: Frontiers in nutrition - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), encompassing Crohn's disease (CD) and ulcerative colitis (UC), arises from multifactorial interactions involving genetics, gut microbiota dysbiosis, immune dysregu...
